rss_count.description: RSS feed counts for FinTech news articles

trigger.condition: daily FinTech news article count > prior 7-day average * 1.3

entry_exit.entry: daily FinTech news article count > prior 7-day average * 1.3
entry_exit.exit: after 10 trading days OR daily news count < prior 7-day average * 1.1
